---
title: "Emily Roberts, PhD"
---



<div style="text-align: center; margin-top: 40px;">
 <h1></h1>
 <h3>Assistant Professor</h3>
 <h4>Department of Biostatistics</h4>
 <h4>College of Public Health</h4>
 <h4>University of Iowa</h4>
</div>

<div style="max-width: 800px; margin: 40px auto; line-height: 1.6; font-size: 1.1em;">
 <p>


Hi! I am an [assistant professor of biostatistics at the University of Iowa](https://www.public-health.uiowa.edu/people/emily-roberts/). Welcome to my page where I have included a bit about myself and my work. I'm excited about statistical methodology that can be meaningfully used in a clinical setting. 

I completed my PhD at the [Department of Biostatistics, University of Michigan](https://sph.umich.edu/biostat/) in 2022 with my PhD dissertation “Causal Inference Methods and Intermediate Endpoints in Randomized Clinical Trials”. I earned my MS in biostatistics from Michigan in 2018 and graduated Summa Cum Laude in 2016 from Coe College with a BA in mathematics and psychology. My passion for medical research and ultimate career goals stem from my diagnosis of type I diabetes at the age of four. 

## Exciting News and Stories

[Roberts to Lead University of Iowa Causal Inference Collaboratory](https://www.public-health.uiowa.edu/news-items/roberts-to-lead-collaboratory-focused-on-causal-inference-research/)

[University of Iowa's Meet the Faculty](https://www.public-health.uiowa.edu/news-items/meet-our-faculty-emily-roberts/)

[Running Beyond Type One: My T1D and PhD Journey](https://beyondtype1.org/nyc-marathon-phd-training-roberts/?fbclid=IwAR3PoOFonkJz3rMLkEic915zJj9_J_xiYNoIGRj29nnkdhoQbh51x1-Kjws)

[Rackham Predoctoral Fellowship Recipients](https://rackham.umich.edu/predoctoral-fellowship-celebration/)

[Kohawk Stories](https://www.coe.edu/why-coe/kohawk-stories/emily-roberts)

[McElroy Fellowship](https://www.mcelroytrust.org/success-stories)

[The Gazette](https://www.thegazette.com/higher-education/coe-grad-receives-prestigious-fellowships/)
